name: openclaw--skills--openclaw-skill-blinko
description: Manage Blinko notes via its REST API (create/list/delete notes, manage tags/taxonomy). Use when the user says “blinko …”, wants to capture a note to Blinko, list/search recent notes, retag notes, or do cleanup/organization. Requires BLINKO_API_KEY. Use when this capability is needed.
